prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic DSLR street-fashion portrait of a stylish Pakistani girl standing full-body against a tall rough concrete urban wall covered with black graffiti splatter and abstract bird silhouettes, in a rainy city alley with wet reflective pavement and a softly blurred modern street background on the left. She faces the camera in a relaxed fashion pose, one leg crossed in front of the other, long straight brown hair over her shoulders, wearing a luxury western-fusion outfit without dupatta: a knee-length grey and black printed kurti with black embroidered floral patterns, black neckline and sleeve panels, patterned border hem, slim white trousers, chunky white sneakers with black accents, and a silver wristwatch. Add exactly 5 birds around her: 2 large blue-and-yellow macaws/parrots with wings fully spread, one flying in from the left and one from the right; 2 white gull-like birds near her lower left and lower right; and 1 tiny colorful hummingbird above her head. Make the parrots appear dynamic and sharp, with dramatic shadows cast onto the concrete wall. Use moody overcast lighting, high detail fabric texture, realistic skin and hair, shallow depth of field, cinematic contrast, 8K editorial photography quality, vertical 9:16 composition. Add a small elegant handwritten signature watermark at bottom right reading Created by Mr. Tariq.
